text.content:
Injuries • Acid • Acidic Aftershock

Injury Card

Acidic Aftershock

As the initial burn subsides, a lingering tingling sensation spreads through your body, making every movement feel like a small jolt of electricity. It's as if the acid left a parting gift of prickling discomfort to remind you of its potent presence.

Treatment

Applying a soothing salve or receiving gentle massages can help calm the acidic aftershock. Rest and relaxation are recommended to ease the residual tingling sensation.

Details

  • Category: Acid

  • Severity: Minor

  • Damage: 2 Hit Points

  • Duration: 30

  • Status Effect: none

Metadata

The metadata is used to generate the Injury in the chat window. Poorly formatted metadata will result in broken or nonfunctional injuries.

  • journaltype: injury

  • category: Acid

  • odds: 40

  • foldername: Injuries

  • title: Acidic Aftershock

  • imagetitle:

  • image: icons/commodities/materials/liquid-green.webp

  • description: As the initial burn subsides, a lingering tingling sensation spreads through your body, making every movement feel like a small jolt of electricity. It's as if the acid left a parting gift of prickling discomfort to remind you of its potent presence.

  • treatment: Applying a soothing salve or receiving gentle massages can help calm the acidic aftershock. Rest and relaxation are recommended to ease the residual tingling sensation.

  • severity: Minor

  • damage: 2

  • duration: 180

  • action: Apply the Acid Injury

  • statuseffect: none

Injuries • Acid • Corrosive Consequences

Injury Card

Corrosive Consequences

The searing touch of acid leaves behind a trail of corrosive consequences, etching its mark on your flesh with a cruel and unforgiving touch. Each drop sizzles and seethes, dissolving everything it touches in a symphony of destruction.

Treatment

Immediate decontamination and neutralization of the acid are paramount to limit the spread of the corrosive consequences. Thoroughly rinsing the affected area with water and seeking medical attention can help prevent further tissue damage.

Details

  • Category: Acid

  • Severity: Moderate

  • Damage: 7 Hit Points

  • Duration: 80

  • Status Effect: Stunned

Metadata

The metadata is used to generate the Injury in the chat window. Poorly formatted metadata will result in broken or nonfunctional injuries.

  • journaltype: injury

  • category: Acid

  • odds: 20

  • foldername: Injuries

  • title: Corrosive Consequences

  • imagetitle:

  • description: The searing touch of acid leaves behind a trail of corrosive consequences, etching its mark on your flesh with a cruel and unforgiving touch. Each drop sizzles and seethes, dissolving everything it touches in a symphony of destruction.

  • treatment: Immediate decontamination and neutralization of the acid are paramount to limit the spread of the corrosive consequences. Thoroughly rinsing the affected area with water and seeking medical attention can help prevent further tissue damage.

  • severity: Moderate

  • damage: 7

  • duration: 480

  • action: Apply the Acid Injury

  • statuseffect: Stunned

Injuries • Acid • Fizzbang Fiasco

Injury Card

Fizzbang Fiasco

During a battle, a mischievous goblin throws a flask of fizzing and popping concoction that you mistake for ale. Your skin becomes bright green and emits a faint smell of citrus. You feel charged with energy but realize you can no longer stand up straight!

Mischief In A Flask
Treatment

Wash the affected area with vinegar-infused soap and rest for 24 hours.

Details

  • Category: Acid

  • Severity: Major

  • Damage: 10 Hit Points

  • Duration: Permanent

  • Status Effect: Prone

Metadata

The metadata is used to generate the Injury in the chat window. Poorly formatted metadata will result in broken or nonfunctional injuries.

  • journaltype: injury

  • category: Acid

  • odds: 5

  • foldername: Injuries

  • title: Fizzbang Fiasco

  • imagetitle: Mischief In A Flask

  • image: icons/magic/acid/dissolve-bone-skull.webp

  • description: During a battle, a mischievous goblin throws a flask of fizzing and popping concoction that you mistake for ale. Your skin becomes bright green and emits a faint smell of citrus. You feel charged with energy but realize you can no longer stand up straight!

  • treatment: Wash the affected area with vinegar-infused soap and rest for 24 hours.

  • severity: Major

  • damage: 10

  • duration: 0

  • action: Apply the Acid Injury

  • statuseffect: Prone

Injuries • Acid • Fizzler's Folly

Injury Card

Fizzler's Folly

After an encounter with a mischievous alchemist, you find your limbs randomly emitting harmless bubbles that pop with noxious gas. So far, they smell of strawberries but who knows what's next!

Mysterious Meltdown
Treatment

The only cure seems to be a sip from a flask carried by the alchemist, but you must seek him out first.

Details

  • Category: Acid

  • Severity: Moderate

  • Damage: 6 Hit Points

  • Duration: 50

  • Status Effect: Poisoned

Metadata

The metadata is used to generate the Injury in the chat window. Poorly formatted metadata will result in broken or nonfunctional injuries.

  • treatment: The only cure seems to be a sip from a flask carried by the alchemist, but you must seek him out first.

  • damage: 6

  • statuseffect: Poisoned

Injuries • Acid • Hissing Haze

Injury Card

Hissing Haze

A faint hissing sound accompanies the acid's contact with your skin, creating an eerie backdrop to the searing pain. It's as though the very air around you echoes the potent potency of the acid, enveloping you in a disconcerting auditory haze.

Treatment

Keeping the affected area clean and dry can help reduce the hissing haze's effects. Avoiding further exposure to irritants and maintaining a calm environment can alleviate the discomfort caused by the unsettling auditory backdrop.

Details

  • Category: Acid

  • Severity: Minor

  • Damage: 3 Hit Points

  • Duration: 40

  • Status Effect: Incapacitated

Metadata

The metadata is used to generate the Injury in the chat window. Poorly formatted metadata will result in broken or nonfunctional injuries.

  • category: Acid

  • odds: 40

  • foldername: Injuries

  • title: Hissing Haze

  • treatment: Keeping the affected area clean and dry can help reduce the hissing haze's effects. Avoiding further exposure to irritants and maintaining a calm environment can alleviate the discomfort caused by the unsettling auditory backdrop.

  • severity: Minor

  • damage: 3

  • duration: 240

  • statuseffect: Incapacitated

Injuries • Acid • Melting Misery

Injury Card

Melting Misery

The acid's insidious effects deepen, causing a sensation akin to melting to seep through your skin. Each movement feels like a slow dissolution, as if you're gradually losing form and cohesion under the acidic assault.

Treatment

Cooling the affected area with ice packs or seeking shelter from heat sources can slow down the melting misery. Rest and hydration are crucial to counteract the disintegrating sensation caused by the acid's corrosive touch.

Details

  • Category: Acid

  • Severity: Minor

  • Damage: 2 Hit Points

  • Duration: 70

  • Status Effect: Incapacitated

Metadata

The metadata is used to generate the Injury in the chat window. Poorly formatted metadata will result in broken or nonfunctional injuries.

  • treatment: Cooling the affected area with ice packs or seeking shelter from heat sources can slow down the melting misery. Rest and hydration are crucial to counteract the disintegrating sensation caused by the acid's corrosive touch.

Injuries • Acid • Pickle Puddle Pains

Injury Card

Pickle Puddle Pains

Your feet have transformed into pickle jars, complete with the light crunch of pickles as you walk. Sadly, the aroma has attracted some rather odd creatures to follow you around.

Vinegary Vexation
Treatment

A thorough soak in fresh water might dilute the acidic transformation, but don't ask about the side effects.

Details

  • Category: Acid

  • Severity: Major

  • Damage: 10 Hit Points

  • Duration: 100

  • Status Effect: Grappled

Metadata

The metadata is used to generate the Injury in the chat window. Poorly formatted metadata will result in broken or nonfunctional injuries.

  • duration: 600

  • statuseffect: Grappled

Injuries • Acid • Sizzling Surprise

Injury Card

Sizzling Surprise

A sudden wave of heat radiates from the acid-affected area, causing beads of sweat to form on your forehead. It's as though a hidden furnace has been activated within you, turning up the heat in an unexpected and uncomfortable manner.

Treatment

Cooling the affected area with a damp cloth or seeking shade can alleviate the sizzling surprise. Hydration and avoiding heat sources can help regulate your body temperature during this unexpected heat wave.

Details

  • Category: Acid

  • Severity: Minor

  • Damage: 4 Hit Points

  • Duration: 50

  • Status Effect: none

Metadata

The metadata is used to generate the Injury in the chat window. Poorly formatted metadata will result in broken or nonfunctional injuries.

  • category: Acid

  • odds: 40

  • foldername: Injuries

  • title: Sizzling Surprise

  • imagetitle:

  • description: A sudden wave of heat radiates from the acid-affected area, causing beads of sweat to form on your forehead. It's as though a hidden furnace has been activated within you, turning up the heat in an unexpected and uncomfortable manner.

  • treatment: Cooling the affected area with a damp cloth or seeking shade can alleviate the sizzling surprise. Hydration and avoiding heat sources can help regulate your body temperature during this unexpected heat wave.

  • severity: Minor

  • damage: 4

  • duration: 300

  • action: Apply the Acid Injury

  • statuseffect: none

Injuries • Acid • Sour Grapes Syndrome

Injury Card

Sour Grapes Syndrome

Those affected by Sour Grapes Syndrome find their skin enrobed in a faint shade of violet, emitting an unpleasant vinegar-like odor. Physical touch may result in a mild burning sensation. Caution: prolonged exposure may cause spontaneous fermentation.

Bitter Harvest
Treatment

The affected individual can counteract the effects of Sour Grapes Syndrome with regular applications of sweetened almond oil to the affected areas.

Details

  • Category: Acid

  • Severity: Major

  • Damage: 12 Hit Points

  • Duration: Permanent

  • Status Effect: Poisoned

Metadata

The metadata is used to generate the Injury in the chat window. Poorly formatted metadata will result in broken or nonfunctional injuries.

  • statuseffect: Poisoned

Injuries • Acid • Sour Note Symphony

Injury Card

Sour Note Symphony

Your voice has taken a musical turn, emitting a range of sour, yet oddly catchy notes every time you try to speak. Your party is considering earplugs as a necessity.

Tangy Tune Trouble
Treatment

Someone skilled in bardic arts might be able to 'tune' your voice back to normal, but be prepared for an impromptu performance or two.

Details

  • Category: Acid

  • Severity: Minor

  • Damage: 3 Hit Points

  • Duration: 30

  • Status Effect: none

Injuries • Acid • Spicy Surprise

Injury Card

Spicy Surprise

After a run-in with a mischievous alchemist's pet, you now have a burning sensation coursing through your veins. The taste of copper fills your mouth, and every sip of water feels like torture.

Fizzing Elixir
Treatment

Diluting the acid with a herbal remedy or magical poultice can help neutralize the effects.

Details

  • Category: Acid

  • Severity: Major

  • Damage: 10 Hit Points

  • Duration: 50

  • Status Effect: Poisoned
